Off Calendar Feb-23-2005 Text Ruling

Apportionment Of Settlement Funds.
Off Calendar Dec-14-2004 Continued To Feb-08-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218

Mtn For Apportionment Proceeding & For Order To Distribute Settlement Funds
Off Calendar Dec-15-2004 Continued To Feb-08-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on regularly for a motion for apportionment proceeding & for order to distribute settlement funds. Com. Sue Kaplan; Clerks R. Edwards/M. Chin; CRS Tony Vaughn/Mitch Lyons; Bruce Jackson, Esq. appeared on behalf of plaintiff-heirs ( Patricia Pitre; Ray Charles Pitre; Corlean Pitre Vranesh; Mary Ann Pitre Caschen; and Rose Mary Pitre Simpson ); Bruce Bernstein, Esq. appeared on behalf of defendant. All plaintiffs were sworn and examined. Defendant's Exhibit # A (Obituary); Exhibit # B (photograph) were admitted and therafter returned to defense counsel.

The Court, having heard testimony and having reviewed documentry evidence, made the following findings: due to issues raised this day, additional briefing is needed to make a determination for the distribution of settlement funds. Respective counsel to prepare and file additional authority: defendant's to file brief x 1/14/05; Plaintiffs' to file and serve response x 2/4/05; defendant's waived reply; plaintiff to prepare and submit an order to Dept. 218; motion is continued to 2/8/05 at 9:00 am in Dept. 218; no further testimony and appearances by counsel will not be necessary on 2/8.

Apportionment Of Settlement Funds.

Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/R.Edwards, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
Appearances: Bruce Jackson, Esq. for Plaintiffsl; Bruce Bernstein, Esq. for Claimants
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court continues this matter till 11/30/04. The 2 subpoened plaintiffs ( Brenda Pitre and Poland Pitre, Jr.) to be present at the hearing.
